# Requiements Outline
This document will outline requirements for functionality as they come up. 

## User Management

### User Registration
A new user should be able to register on the application and create a *username* and *password* for a user entry in the database.

#### Sub-Tasks:
* Password should be hashed in the database
* A new user ID field should be autogenerated

### User Login
A user should be able to login to the application, providing a username and password. 

### User Information Update
A user should be able to update their email and password.
